subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 08/25] server41tests: test mkdir triggers dir delegation recall

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite, which verifies that creating a subdirectory from a second client triggers a directory delegation recall on the server. The test first gets a directory delegation without notification, then creates a new subdirectory from another client, and finally checks if the server issues a CB_RECALL. This ensures that the server properly recalls the delegation when a new subdirectory is created under a delegated directory.
